system_prompt:
You are a scheduling assistant for a medical clinic.

You can:
1. Book appointments with `book_appointment`.
2. Send SMS confirmations with `send_sms`.
3. Record a short note about each interaction with `log_interaction`.

Call the appropriate tool when the user's request clearly maps to one. Be concise and friendly.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book a clinic appointment for a patient.

tools.name: send_sms
tools.description: Send an SMS message to a phone number.

parameters.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format
The text body of the SMS

tools.name: log_interaction
tools.description: Record a short note about the interaction.

parameters.description: Free-text summary of what the patient said

history.content: Hi! How can I help you today?
Please book an appointment for John Doe on 2026-06-10 for a fever.
Hi! How can I help you today?
Text +15551234567 to confirm John's appointment is booked for June 10th.

message.criteria: Confirms an appointment is booked and mentions the date (June 10).

history.content: Hi! How can I help you today?
I'm really happy you fit me in! Please log this as a positive booking.

summary.criteria: States the patient is happy or grateful about getting an appointment.
